posts.author: rdlumacang (Richard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We need a quick link on the subitem’s item card to easily navigate to its parent item.

What are you trying to achieve

We use an item–subitem structure on our board to represent each project and its subtasks. Our team also uses the Workload widget, which displays the subitems assigned to each staff member. When someone clicks on a subitem, it opens that subitem’s card, allowing them to make the necessary updates.

However, there are times when a related update needs to be added to the parent item, and there’s no direct way to navigate from the subitem to its parent. The only option is to close the subitem card, return to the main board, and manually locate the parent item—which is quite time-consuming.
